core_payload.content:
# N1Hub.com: Dream Overlay

## 1. Current Role of Dream
Real now owns the canonical statement of the current N1Hub runtime contract. Dream therefore should not restate the live operating focus as if the present runtime were still unsettled.

## 2. What Dream Still Owns
Dream remains the place for future N1Hub delta such as:
- a calmer and deeper habitat where memory, planning, mining, delegation, and execution feel even more unified,
- stronger replacement of scattered tools with one sovereign environment,
- richer long-horizon coordination between Workspace, Personal AI Assistant, A2C, DeepMine, Vault Stewardship, Symphony, and background runtime lanes,
- a more complete second-brain operating system where one human and many bounded agents can improve memory and execution together.

## 3. Explicit Non-Goals
Dream should not:
- overwrite the stronger real-side statement of the current runtime contract,
- collapse present operating law back into broad visionary prose,
- reintroduce autonomous steward notes as constitutional runtime doctrine.

## 4. Dream Lens
The useful Dream stance is to preserve the larger habitat vision and future integration delta while letting Real stay canonical for what N1Hub currently is in operation.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub Runtime in the Dream branch now stands as the future habitat overlay rather than the canonical source of current runtime truth. Real owns the live operating contract, while Dream preserves the larger sovereign second-brain vision in which memory, planning, mining, delegation, and bounded background agents feel more deeply unified. This keeps Dream useful as future integration doctrine without letting it replace the sharper real-side description of what N1Hub currently is in operation.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: The capsule content details a comprehensive ecosystem with distinct modules (DeepMine, A2C, N-Infinity, Workspace, TileSims, Marketplace) and foundational elements (CapsuleOS, 5-Element Law, Quality Gates). The original summary was broad; refining it to highlight integration and adding keywords grounded in the text improves modularity and completeness without inventing new doctrine.

The Dream N1Hub capsule was narrowed to future-only habitat doctrine after Real became the explicit canonical source for the current N1Hub runtime contract. This preserves the larger vision without leaving the branch split implicit.
